task_name: LapPass® Product Overview and Equipment Showcase
classification_rationale: This is a product demonstration and marketing video for Inovus Medical LapPass® training kits. It contains no actual performance footage, no trainee or surgeon performing FLS tasks, and no real-time task execution. The frames show static equipment displays, labeled components, and branding with no clinical or training activity visible. This is educational/promotional content only.
reason_no_score: This video does not contain an actual FLS task performance. It is a product showcase video displaying various LapPass® kit components (peg transfer boards, suturing practice bases, cutting practice skins, hoops, pegs, ligating loop apparatus, and related accessories). There is no trainee or expert performing any of the five FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). No timing data, performance metrics, or technique execution is present.

video_content_summary.frames_1_to_5: Overview of complete LapPass® kit system with peg transfer boards (peg pads with hemicircular receptacles), hoops, pegs, and other training modules arranged on white background
video_content_summary.frames_6_to_9: Close-up views of the LapPass® peg transfer and ligating loop apparatus showing blue hoops, metal clamps, and blue peg positions with labeled component callouts
video_content_summary.frames_10_to_15: Display of individual training modules: suturing skills base (pink foam with hemicircular markings and metal clamps), cutting practice skin (pink foam with circular pattern marked in dashed line)
video_content_summary.frames_16_to_19: Product components: replacement foam pads, hoops and pegs (blue plastic), white connector pieces, and accessories
video_content_summary.frames_20_to_21: Inovus Medical branding and LapPass® kits promotional slides with Association of Laparoscopic Surgeons (ALS) logo and website reference

frame_analyses.description: Full LapPass® training kit system displayed with multiple foam pads, metal clamps, hoops, and pegs visible
Multiple LapPass® peg transfer boards arranged in setup position showing hemicircular peg receptacles
LapPass® peg transfer board with blue hoops and metal clamps in place, labeled 'LapPass kit with hoops and pegs in place'
Suturing skills base foam pad displayed with hemicircular practice zones and metal clamps
Cutting practice skin with circular dashed pattern marked for precision cutting task
Inovus Medical LapPass® Kits promotional slide with ALS association logo and website

confidence_rationale: Absolute certainty that this is instructional/marketing content. No performance footage exists. Video is clearly a product showcase with static displays, labeled components, and promotional branding. No trainee, no task execution, no time-based activity.
cannot_score_reasons: No trainee or surgeon performing FLS tasks
No real-time execution of Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture
No technique execution observable for scoring penalties
